claim: The prediction in atom ATOM_T013_S010_PRE_01 ("But I think some people are trying. And it turns out that Mac minis, for exam...") is the resolution of the blocker in atom ATOM_T002_S020_BLO_01 ("And this problem, this long context, really arises because we're trying to fi...").
